published_prior_art.cite: TramontanoDrtonEtesami2024 gives the TDE graphical certificate and hidden row system, not a finite observable cumulant-transfer construction
TramontanoDrtonEtesami2024 gives the hidden B_Lambda row system; the observable cumulant-row lift is not stated
KivvaSalehkaleybarKiyavash2023 and TramontanoKivvaSalehkaleybarDrtonKiyavash2025 give special proxy/underspecified-IV moment formulas, not arbitrary TDE-certified ADMG determinant ratios
none; closest cumulant and TDE papers do not compare distinct admissible observable augmentations
MareisSturmaDrton2026 proves analogous pointwise asymptotic normality for covariance HTC rational estimators, not higher-order cumulant ratios
TramontanoDrtonEtesami2024 notes the IV covariance ratio as the motivating order-2 case
SchkodaRobevaDrton2024 uses graph-dependent higher-order cumulant rank matrices for discovery, not a sharp direct-effect cumulant-order frontier

accepted_scope_caveats.label: thm:cumulant-row-system / thm:closed-form-coefficient
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: The determinant-ratio claims are conditional on a chosen admissible family C in Mcal_m; existence of such a family is not assumed for the finite-order-transfer question.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: The closed-form coefficient is claimed only conditional on admissibility; the genuine novelty is the finite-order transfer and order-frontier questions.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: prop:plugin-delta-method
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: Weak-denominator uniform coverage is explicitly outside scope and inference is pointwise away from det K_X = 0.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: The inference claim is limited to fixed admissible C under finite 2m moments and |det K_X(I_v,C)| >= c0.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add a worked small ADMG exhibit computing one admissible C and the resulting determinant ratio directly from cumulant primitives.
Promote the transfer-search handle into an explicit algorithm with input format, admissibility test, and at least a termination or complexity conjecture for the TDE-certified class.
For the minimal-order OEQ, name a concrete lower-bound route: construct two generic laws matching all cumulants up to order m while separating lambda_uv.
Add SturmaDrton2025 as an adjacent covariance/latent-subgraph comparator or explicitly mark it orthogonal to the non-Gaussian cumulant-transfer problem.

recommended_next_step: Advance this angle to Stage 0 with the conditional scope caveats bound above.
